title: Die natürliche Tochter
summaries: "Die natürliche Tochter" by Johann Wolfgang von Goethe is a verse drama first performed in 1803. Drawing on the French Revolution, it follows Eugenia, the Duke's illegitimate daughter, whose promising future collapses when conspirators plot against her. Abducted and exiled, stripped of her identity and protection, she must navigate a world where political intrigue destroys individual lives. The play examines how uncontrollable historical forces impact ordinary people, exploring the tension between natural integrity and social compromise in revolutionary times.
